opportunities.title: [Hiring] AI Video Editor for short-form social content - $15/hr
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] AI Video Editor for short-form social content - $15/hr

Looking for a video editor to join our team, working on short-form/social style videos (ads, meme-style content, music-video style edits). What we need: Comfortable with After Effects, Premiere Pro, CapCut Bonus if you've used Higgesfield and ElevenLabs Can match pacing/style from reference videos, not just cut footage together Responsive on Slack, organized, good communication This is ongoing work, not a one-off gig. DM me for full brief   submitted by   /u/Low_Relationship_883 [link]   [comments]
